base_rate_degeneracy_note: CL per-market base-rate = 0.0 (DEGENERATE): its pre-committed threshold (fwd_maxDD q80 = 0.152, set by the extreme 2019-2023 oil period incl. 2020) is never reached in the calmer 2024 -> 0 positives. This is a TARGET-DESIGN finding under the pre-committed rule; it must NOT be fixed by re-tuning to the 2024 outcome. A Step-02 amendment (e.g., a rolling/recent-window threshold or a different adverse-condition) is required before per-market CL modeling. ES/GC/6E are non-degenerate.
conditions_carried: D1 (CL degenerate base-rate=0.0): CL has 0 positives in 2024 under the pre-committed threshold; per-market CL modeling is BLOCKED until the target is re-specified via a Step-02 amendment (rolling/recent threshold or different adverse-condition), pre-committed and NOT chosen by 2024 outcome.
D2 (low base-rates / calm 2024): pooled 2024 base-rate 7.8% reflects 2024 being calmer than the 2019-2023 threshold-estimation window; acceptable but note class imbalance for any future modeling.
C2 (degraded days): full Databento degraded-day reconciliation still pending (partial list applied; 0 excluded in 2024).
C5 (firewall): oos_2025_sealed remains untouched until a separate pre-registered OOS gate.

design_pre_committed.degraded_day_rule: exclude decision date if it is a known degraded day (partial list from Databento warning: ['2019-01-15', '2019-02-22', '2019-03-13']); full reconciliation deferred (C2)
design_pre_committed.label_cap: drop decision dates whose t+H exceeds the last discovery common bar (no reach into sealed 2025)
design_pre_committed.label_rule: bad_regime=1 iff forward max-drawdown of the underlying close over (t, t+H] common-calendar bars >= per-market threshold
design_pre_committed.threshold_estimation_window: 2019-01-01..2023-12-31 (pre-2024 discovery; so the 2024 base-rate is MEASURED, not set)

discovery_base_rate.interpretation: fraction of (date,market) rows labeled bad_regime=1, measured on 2024 vs a 2019-2023 q80 threshold; LOW because 2024 was calmer than the 2019-2023 estimation window (which included the 2020 crash + 2022).

feature_target_semantics: Features and label are MARKET-STATE statistics of the underlying futures (momentum/vol/range/drawdown-state/cross-market co-movement/calendar + a forward-drawdown regime label). They are NOT strategy returns/R/PnL/Sharpe; no strategy, signal, or model is constructed here.
